basic_details.short_information: Assam Public Service Commission (APSC) Chemist Notification 2026 has been released on the official website apsc.nic.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the APSC Chemist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 38 years (as on 01-01-2026) Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years (upto 43 years) OBC/MOBC: 3 years (upto 41 years) PwBD: 10 years

qualification.details: Indian Citizen Permanent resident of Assam Second Class M.Sc. Degree in Chemistry from any University recognized by the Government.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Chemist in the Directorate of Geology and Mining, Assam under Mines and Minerals Deptt.

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Chemist in the Directorate of Geology and Mining, Assam under Mines and Minerals Deptt.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 1,10,000/- with Grade Pay Rs. 12,700/-
salary_details.details: Pay scale: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 1,10,000/- Grade Pay: Rs. 12,700/- Pay Band: Pay Band - 4

selection_process: Screening Examination Written Examination Interview Test
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of APSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: APSC Chemist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the APSC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download APSC Chemist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: APSC Chemist Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening Examination Written Examination Interview Test

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of APSC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the APSC Chemist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the APSC Chemist recruitment is 17th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Chemist post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Chemist post is a Second Class M.Sc. Degree in Chemistry from any University recognized by the Government.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the APSC Chemist position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Chemist post is a minimum of 21 years and a maximum of 38 years as of 1st January 2026. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Chemist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Chemist post in the Directorate of Geology and Mining, Assam.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the APSC Chemist recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. For General candidates, it is Rs. 297.20. For OBC/MOBC, it is Rs. 197.20, and for SC/ST/BPL/PwBD, it is Rs. 47.20.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Chemist post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a pay scale of Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 1,10,000/- with a Grade Pay of Rs. 12,700/- in Pay Band - 4.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the APSC Chemist recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Screening Examination, followed by a Written Examination, and finally an Interview Test.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any relaxation in the upper age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST (5 years), OBC/MOBC (3 years), and PwBD (10 years) candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Can I edit my application after submission?
faq.answer: No, editing of the application is not allowed after final submission. Therefore, it is crucial to fill in all details carefully before submitting the form.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can also visit the official APSC recruitment website.
